stage: S5 (Multi-board Depth & Benefit Parity) / P01 事件、实体和跨板块关系

value.user_value: Cross-source entity resolution: agencies/institutions/authors/companies/regions/topics/standards referred to differently across boards (full name, abbreviation, English, variant) resolve to ONE entity, each alias kept with the source that used it. Wrong merges are exactly reversible (merge -> split restores the pre-merge entities byte-for-byte), and a low-confidence merge is held for review rather than auto-applied.
value.why_it_matters: Depth needs entity identity -- the same agency across policy/news/stats must be one node -- but never at the cost of silent over-merging or lost provenance. Reversible, sourced, confidence-bounded resolution is what makes the entity layer trustworthy.

cost.note: unknown != 0; a deterministic resolver over curated mentions -> 0 cloud cost.

deployment: NOT_DEPLOYED (entity schema + aliases + provenance + merge/split audit; production worker/cron/data untouched, live build unchanged b189d3cc0703 == T040)
